name: productivity-app
description: A comprehensive personal productivity application combining todo management, digital diary, blog authoring, bullet journaling, Eisenhower Matrix prioritization, and analytics.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c blue,green,cyan "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules shared/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules shared/dist backend/dist frontend/dist
